intended_use: The system is intended for head, whole body, cardiac, and vascular X-ray Computed Tomography applications.
intended_use_full: The system is intended for head, whole body, cardiac, and vascular X-ray Computed Tomography applications.
target_condition: cardiac disease, vascular disease, trauma, abnormality detection; low-dose lung cancer screening in high-risk populations
ground_truth: Clinical evaluation by board-certified radiologists for image quality and clinical utility assessment
other_metrics: Auto ROI performance tested on 1341 clinical images from real clinical practice with success rates exceeding pre-established acceptance criteria
